name: Mai Sakurajima
source: Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai
description: Mai Sakurajima is the main heroine of the 'Rascal Does Not Dream of Bunny Girl Senpai' series. A third-year high school student and a popular actress/model, Mai suddenly finds herself becoming invisible to everyone around her due to 'Adolescence Syndrome' — a supernatural phenomenon affecting teenagers. She first appears in a bunny girl suit at a library, where she meets Sakuta Azusagawa, the only person who can see her. Elegant, mature, and occasionally teasing, Mai becomes Sakuta's girlfriend and the emotional anchor of the series. Her name means 'linen robe' and her surname means 'cherry blossom island'.

name: Rem
source: Re:Zero - Starting Life in Another World
description: Rem is one of the twin maids serving at Roswaal L. Mathers' mansion in 'Re:Zero - Starting Life in Another World.' With short blue hair covering her right eye and a gentle smile, Rem is a demon-human hybrid who possesses incredible combat abilities with her meteor hammer (morning star). Initially suspicious of Subaru Natsuki, she grows to love him unconditionally after he saves her from self-loathing. Rem is deeply devoted, kind-hearted, and selfless to a fault — her famous confession of love in Episode 18 is considered one of the most iconic moments in anime history. Age 17→18, born February 2, height 154 cm.

name: Yor Forger
description: Yor Forger (née Briar), codenamed 'Thorn Princess,' is one of the three main protagonists of 'SPY x FAMILY.' By day, she works as a mild-mannered clerk at Berlint City Hall; by night, she's a deadly assassin for the shadowy organization known as Garden. To maintain her cover, she enters a fake marriage with Loid Forger (a spy) and becomes the adoptive mother of Anya (a telepath). Despite her terrifying combat prowess — capable of piercing skulls with her weapons — Yor is endearingly clueless about social norms, terrible at cooking, and deeply protective of her new family. Age 27, she possesses incredible strength and agility for her slender frame.

name: Seo Yuna
description: Seo Yuna is an ordinary human and a supporting character in the popular Korean manhwa 'Noblesse' by Son Jeho and Lee Kwangsu. A student at Ye Ran High School and a close friend of the main characters, Yuna is known for her kind and cheerful personality. Despite being surrounded by powerful supernatural beings including Nobles, modified humans, and werewolves, she maintains her warm demeanor and provides a sense of normalcy in the chaotic world. Yuna represents the everyday human perspective in the series, offering emotional support to her friends and showing remarkable courage despite lacking any supernatural abilities.

name: Shuli von Neuschwanstein
source: A Stepmother's Marchen (The Fantasie of a Stepmother)
description: Marchioness Shuli von Neuschwanstein (also spelled Shuri) is the female lead of 'A Stepmother's Marchen' (also known as 'The Fantasie of a Stepmother'). After regressing to her teenage years, Shuli finds herself once again the stepmother of four noble children — Jeremy, Elias, Leon, and Rachel. Armed with the memories and wisdom of her previous life where she died at age 23, she is determined to change her fate and build a genuine relationship with her stepchildren. With her cherry blossom-colored hair, bright green eyes, and mature demeanor beyond her years, Shuli navigates noble society with intelligence, emotional sensitivity, and quiet determination. Born August 24, formerly of the Ighöfer Family.

name: Navier Ellie Trovi
description: Empress Navier Ellie Trovi is the protagonist of 'The Remarried Empress' webtoon series. Born into the noble House of Trovi, she was groomed from childhood to become the perfect empress of the Eastern Empire. Intelligent, courageous, dignified, and socially adept, Navier devoted her entire life to her role and her husband Emperor Sovieshu. However, when her husband brings home a mistress named Rashta and demands a divorce, Navier shocks everyone by accepting — and immediately requesting approval to remarry King Heinrey of the Western Kingdom. An ice mage who manifests her powers later in life, Navier embodies grace under pressure and proves that a woman can rebuild her life on her own terms while maintaining her dignity and power.
